src: A sleek silver hatchback with black alloy wheels, yellow accents on the grille and mirrors. It has rounded headlights, a streamlined front bumper, tinted windows, and smooth, aerodynamic lines.
edit: A robust silver hatchback car with a matte finish, black alloy wheels, yellow highlights on the grille and side mirrors. It has sharp headlights, a bold front bumper, deeply tinted windows, and jagged body lines.

per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-72PbiQhHJHM-unsplash: the object is on a two-lane road, angled slightly to the right, with trees and a vast field under a vibrant sunset sky in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-E5QW_maORfg-unsplash: The object faces forward on an asphalt road, with golden fields on either side, distant trees, and a cloudy sky blending into the horizon.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-ERdWJrv9FeY-unsplash: The object faces forward on a concrete surface with a wall and overcast sky in the background, sunlight subtly illuminating the scene.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-N1p9Ih0qq-c-unsplash: the object angled slightly to the left on an asphalt road, surrounded by sunflowers, near a distant tree line under a colorful sky
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-OfM1G5mWrdU-unsplash: The object angled to the right on a gravel surface, against an industrial building with corrugated metal sides, under overcast skies.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-WyZh1SAPLQw-unsplash: The object angled left on a concrete area, partially shadowed by large, curved metal structures like a hangar, under soft ambient light.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-jUlXwWok3xY-unsplash: the object is angled to the left on wide concrete, surrounded by low walls and sparse foliage under a sunset light
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-maU12ShTjtY-unsplash: The object in the center of a two-lane road, slightly angled, with grass fields and a fence on both sides, under a setting sun casting dramatic lighting.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-nH6uHS1g5Vw-unsplash: The object is angled to the right on a road, centered on lane lines, with trees and a cloudy sky colored by a setting sun.

per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-72PbiQhHJHM-unsplash: The object is on a two-lane road, angled slightly right. A vast field and trees are in the background with a dark storm sky overhead. Lightning illuminates the scene and rain makes the road glisten.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-E5QW_maORfg-unsplash: The object sits on a rain-soaked asphalt road, with darkened fields and trees outlined against gray-black clouds. The sky is filled with storm clouds and lightning, creating contrast against the turbulent environment.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-ERdWJrv9FeY-unsplash: The object stands on a rain-slicked concrete surface with dark storm clouds in the background. Lightning flashes intermittently, illuminating the scene. Raindrops fall sporadically, and distant thunder roars, creating a dramatic storm atmosphere.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-N1p9Ih0qq-c-unsplash: the object is angled slightly to the left on a wet asphalt road, surrounded by sunflower fields and a distant tree line under a stormy sky with swirling clouds and lightning.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-OfM1G5mWrdU-unsplash: The object is angled to the right on a gravel surface, under dark clouds. Behind is an industrial building with corrugated metal sides. The scene has wind rustling through the gravel, enhancing the industrial setting.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-WyZh1SAPLQw-unsplash: The object is angled left on a rain-slicked concrete area, shadowed by large metal structures under dark clouds. Soft light filters through rain and lightning, the wet surface reflects light, creating an intense atmosphere.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-jUlXwWok3xY-unsplash: The object tilted to the left on gritty concrete, surrounded by battered walls and windswept foliage, under turbulent skies with dark clouds and occasional lightning.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-maU12ShTjtY-unsplash: The object is on a two-lane road, slightly angled, with storm clouds overhead. Winds sweep across grass fields and a fence on either side, with lightning casting shadows under the tumultuous sky.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-nH6uHS1g5Vw-unsplash: An object angled to the right on a darkened road, centered on wet lane lines from rain. Tall trees bend in strong winds, under a dark, swirling stormy sky, with lightning flashes illuminating the scene.
